evals.name: general-pre-submission-check
evals.prompt: hey im about to send my drawing to vikram for review, whats the stuff i need to double check before i hit send
evals.expected_output: Walkthrough of the self-check list: dimensions/annotations, bend lines + flat pattern, CU PROFI hole clearances on copper. Should also mention DXF export verification and -LAY version.

evals.name: dxf-bend-lines-export
evals.prompt: my last couple DXFs had no bend lines when susan opened them in amada, how do i fix the solidworks export settings
evals.expected_output: Exact SolidWorks setup: Tools → Options → Document Properties → DXF/DWG Export → Custom Map. Map bend lines to BEND layer. Use Centerline/Section style, NOT Hidden. Mention unsuppressing Bend-Lines feature and verifying the exported DXF.

evals.name: cu-profi-copper-clearance
evals.prompt: quick one - copper part, 3/8 bolt thru hole, whats the clearance supposed to be? i keep forgetting
evals.expected_output: 0.406 inches. Should clarify this is for copper only (CU PROFI table), different from galvanized/aluminum clearances.

evals.name: revision-type-letter-vs-number
evals.prompt: i forgot a dimension on a part thats already at the shop and i just fixed it. do i bump the letter or just add a number to the current rev
evals.expected_output: Number increment (e.g., rA → rA1) because it's a drawing-only change with no physical change. Letter is for physical part changes.
